title: Better Material Lists
description: Adds another way of managing your Litematica material lists!
body:
This mod helps you with material lists! 

By using the writting to file function in litematica, you can now access those files in a nice new UI. You can scroll up and down easily, check things off and bring them back. Everything is saved using files, so you dont loose progress when leaving the world or area!

First, open the material list in litematica and click on "Write to file". Then, open the mod's UI by pressing your keybind for it (by default r) and click on "Open new material list". Select the wanted file (probably the most recent one) and thats it!
